title: Revive Rod
body:
Dying in the middle of an adventure sucks, especially when you realise your bed is 1000 blocks away. The revive rod is a new cheap item, like the lightning rod, except it atrracts souls. You can place it within ten blocks of where your friend died, where it will activate and give them an option to revive.

## Features
- New revive rod block
- Activates when near someone in the death screen
- Plays a sound on activation
- Emits restone power when active
- New Revive Screen
- Options to accept or decline revive
- Option to go to title screen
